source.name: WormAtlas NeuronConnect
source.normalization: Cell IDs are uppercased; chemical receive rows validate send rows; electrical rows are collapsed to undirected pairs.
source.layout: Body-axis layout enriched with WormWiring SI 4 cell type/category metadata where available. Positions are anatomical approximations from class, segment, side, and AP body region, not measured 3D nuclei coordinates.
